plugins.name: vault-audit
plugins.description: Audit a Claude-Code markdown knowledge vault against its own declared rules: a deterministic fixer + a judgment reviewer, each in an isolated git worktree.

plugins.name: vault-feed
plugins.description: Feed a Claude-Code knowledge vault: fetch curated feeds, filter each item for relevance to your stack, and triage the keepers into a dispositioned backlog. A scout (pull + significance filter) + a triager (interactive disposition).
